lineage.Process: ExportFeatures SECC_CE_20250101 C:\Users\aleja\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\Lorca_TFG\Lorca_TFG.gdb\SECC_RegionMurcia # NOT_USE_ALIAS "CUSEC "CUSEC" true true false 10 Text 0 0,First,#,SECC_CE_20250101,CUSEC,0,9;NCA "NCA" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,SECC_CE_20250101,NCA,0,49;NMUN "NMUN" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,SECC_CE_20250101,NMUN,0,49" #

ExportFeatures SECC_RegionMurcia C:\Users\aleja\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\Lorca_TFG\Lorca_TFG.gdb\SECC_Lorca # NOT_USE_ALIAS "CUSEC "CUSEC" true true false 10 Text 0 0,First,#,SECC_RegionMurcia,CUSEC,0,9;Shape_Length "Shape_Length" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,SECC_RegionMurcia,Shape_Length,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,SECC_RegionMurcia,Shape_Area,-1,-1" #
CopyFeatures SECC_Lorca C:\Users\aleja\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\Lorca_TFG\Lorca_TFG.gdb\SECC_Lorca_NEdif # # # #
JoinField C:\Users\aleja\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\Lorca_TFG\Lorca_TFG.gdb\SECC_Lorca_NEdif OBJECTID in_memory\summary_stats FID_SECC_Lorca_NEdif # NOT_USE_FM # NO_INDEXES
CalculateFields tempLayere3427b8d-2c1c-439a-8402-c73f10616a43 PYTHON3 "Point_Count 0 # #" # NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
DeleteField C:\Users\aleja\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\Lorca_TFG\Lorca_TFG.gdb\SECC_Lorca_NEdif FID_SECC_Lorca_NEdif DELETE_FIELDS
SummarizeWithin SECC_Lorca EdifLorca_Centroide C:\Users\aleja\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\Lorca_TFG\Lorca_TFG.gdb\SECC_Lorca_NEdif KEEP_ALL # ADD_SHAPE_SUM SQUAREKILOMETERS # NO_MIN_MAJ NO_PERCENT #

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.5.0'><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>SECC_Lorca_NEdif</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AlterField><field_name>Point_Count</field_name><new_field_name>Num_Edif</new_field_name><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><clear_field_alias>False</clear_field_alias></AlterField></workflow></operationSequence>

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.5.0'><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>SECC_Lorca_NEdif</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>Vulnerabilidad</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>

ExportFeatures SECC_Lorca_NEdif C:\Users\aleja\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\Lorca_TFG\Lorca_TFG.gdb\SSCC_NumEdif_x_Vul_Lorca # NOT_USE_ALIAS "CUSEC "CUSEC" true true false 10 Text 0 0,First,#,SECC_Lorca_NEdif,SECC_Lorca_NEdif.CUSEC,0,9;Num_Edif "Count of Points" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,SECC_Lorca_NEdif,SECC_Lorca_NEdif.Num_Edif,-1,-1;CUSEC "CUSEC" true true false 8 BigInteger 0 0,First,#,SECC_Lorca_NEdif,Vuln_x_SSCC_PT.CUSEC,-1,-1;M11_PRE "M11-PRE" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,SECC_Lorca_NEdif,Vuln_x_SSCC_PT.M11_PRE,-1,-1;M31_PRE "M31-PRE" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,SECC_Lorca_NEdif,Vuln_x_SSCC_PT.M31_PRE,-1,-1;M34_PRE "M34-PRE" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,SECC_Lorca_NEdif,Vuln_x_SSCC_PT.M34_PRE,-1,-1;RC31_LOW "RC31-LOW" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,SECC_Lorca_NEdif,Vuln_x_SSCC_PT.RC31_LOW,-1,-1;RC31_PRE "RC31-PRE" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,SECC_Lorca_NEdif,Vuln_x_SSCC_PT.RC31_PRE,-1,-1" #

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.5.0'><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>SSCC_NumEdif_x_Vul_Lorca</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>Porc_M11PRE</field_name><field_type>LONG</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>Porc_M31PRE</field_name><field_type>LONG</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>Porc_M34PRE</field_name><field_type>LONG</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>Porc_RC31LOW</field_name><field_type>LONG</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>Porc_RC31PRE</field_name><field_type>LONG</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.5.0'><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>SSCC_NumEdif_x_Vul_Lorca</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>Field</field_name><field_type>LONG</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
DeleteField SSCC_NumEdif_x_Vul_Lorca Field DELETE_FIELDS
CalculateField SSCC_NumEdif_x_Vul_Lorca Porc_M11PRE "!M11_PRE! / !Num_Edif! * 100" PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField SSCC_NumEdif_x_Vul_Lorca Porc_M31PRE "!M31_PRE!/ !Num_Edif! * 100" PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField SSCC_NumEdif_x_Vul_Lorca Porc_M34PRE "!M34_PRE!/ !Num_Edif! * 100" PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField SSCC_NumEdif_x_Vul_Lorca Porc_RC31LOW "!RC31_LOW!/ !Num_Edif! * 100" PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField SSCC_NumEdif_x_Vul_Lorca Porc_RC31PRE "!RC31_PRE!/ !Num_Edif! * 100" PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.5.0'><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>SSCC_NumEdif_x_Vul_Lorca</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>Total</field_name><field_type>LONG</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateField SSCC_NumEdif_x_Vul_Lorca Total "!Porc_M11PRE! + !Porc_M31PRE! + !Porc_M34PRE! + !Porc_RC31LOW! + !Porc_RC31PRE!" PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
DeleteField SSCC_NumEdif_x_Vul_Lorca Porc_M11PRE;Porc_M31PRE;Porc_M34PRE;Porc_RC31LOW;Porc_RC31PRE DELETE_FIELDS

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.5.0'><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>SSCC_NumEdif_x_Vul_Lorca</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>Porc_M11PRE</field_name><field_type>FLOAT</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>Porc_M31PRE</field_name><field_type>FLOAT</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>Porc_M34PRE</field_name><field_type>FLOAT</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>Porc_RC31LOW</field_name><field_type>FLOAT</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>Porc_RC31PRE</field_name><field_type>FLOAT</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateField SSCC_NumEdif_x_Vul_Lorca Porc_M11PRE Round($feature.M11_PRE / $feature.Num_Edif * 100) ARCADE # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField SSCC_NumEdif_x_Vul_Lorca Porc_M11PRE Round($feature.M11_PRE / $feature.Num_Edif) ARCADE # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField SSCC_NumEdif_x_Vul_Lorca Porc_M11PRE Round($feature.M11_PRE / $feature.Num_Edif*100,2) ARCADE # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField SSCC_NumEdif_x_Vul_Lorca Porc_M31PRE Round($feature.M31_PRE / $feature.Num_Edif*100,2) ARCADE # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField SSCC_NumEdif_x_Vul_Lorca Porc_M34PRE Round($feature.M34_PRE / $feature.Num_Edif*100,2) ARCADE # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField SSCC_NumEdif_x_Vul_Lorca Porc_RC31LOW Round($feature.RC31_LOW / $feature.Num_Edif*100,2) ARCADE # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField SSCC_NumEdif_x_Vul_Lorca Porc_RC31PRE Round($feature.RC31_PRE / $feature.Num_Edif*100,2) ARCADE # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField SSCC_NumEdif_x_Vul_Lorca Total "$feature.Porc_M11PRE + $feature.Porc_M31PRE + $feature.Porc_M34PRE + $feature.Porc_RC31LOW + $feature.Porc_RC31PRE" ARCADE # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

ExportFeatures SSCC_NumEdif_x_Vul_Lorca C:\Users\aleja\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\Lorca_TFG\Lorca_TFG.gdb\SSCC_NEdif_x_Vul_Lorca # NOT_USE_ALIAS "CUSEC "CUSEC" true true false 10 Text 0 0,First,#,SSCC_NumEdif_x_Vul_Lorca,CUSEC,0,9;Num_Edif "Num_Edif" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,SSCC_NumEdif_x_Vul_Lorca,Num_Edif,-1,-1;M11_PRE "M11-PRE" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,SSCC_NumEdif_x_Vul_Lorca,M11_PRE,-1,-1;M31_PRE "M31-PRE" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,SSCC_NumEdif_x_Vul_Lorca,M31_PRE,-1,-1;M34_PRE "M34-PRE" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,SSCC_NumEdif_x_Vul_Lorca,M34_PRE,-1,-1;RC31_LOW "RC31-LOW" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,SSCC_NumEdif_x_Vul_Lorca,RC31_LOW,-1,-1;RC31_PRE "RC31-PRE" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,SSCC_NumEdif_x_Vul_Lorca,RC31_PRE,-1,-1" #

ExportFeatures SSCC_NEdif_x_Vul_Lorca C:\xampp\htdocs\merisur\pythonCode\inputs\shapefiles\SSCC_NEdif_Vul_Lorca.shp # NOT_USE_ALIAS "CUSEC "CUSEC" true true false 10 Text 0 0,First,#,SSCC_NEdif_x_Vul_Lorca,CUSEC,0,9;Num_Edif "Num_Edif" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,SSCC_NEdif_x_Vul_Lorca,Num_Edif,-1,-1;M11_PRE "M11-PRE" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,SSCC_NEdif_x_Vul_Lorca,M11_PRE,-1,-1;M31_PRE "M31-PRE" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,SSCC_NEdif_x_Vul_Lorca,M31_PRE,-1,-1;M34_PRE "M34-PRE" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,SSCC_NEdif_x_Vul_Lorca,M34_PRE,-1,-1;RC31_LOW "RC31-LOW" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,SSCC_NEdif_x_Vul_Lorca,RC31_LOW,-1,-1;RC31_PRE "RC31-PRE" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,SSCC_NEdif_x_Vul_Lorca,RC31_PRE,-1,-1;Shape_Length "Shape_Length" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,SSCC_NEdif_x_Vul_Lorca,Shape_Length,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,SSCC_NEdif_x_Vul_Lorca,Shape_Area,-1,-1" #

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.
